verse_text: when I call to remembrance the genuine faith that is in you, which dwelt first in your grandmother Lois and your mother Eunice, and I am persuaded is in you also.

pericope.title: Timothy's Gift, the Power of God

links.context: In Judaism the family was joined to the covenant through the father. But in the Church, the family is holy if either spouse is a believer (see also [[2TI.1:5]]). This does not mean that all are saved, but all are affected by the faith of a Christian spouse. The family is a spiritual unit: if one member is a Christian, the whole family is set apart by God's grace.

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
